learningObjectives.value: CLO1: Identify and apply AI-driven business analytics technologies, their underlying concepts and business applications.
learningObjectives.quote: CLO1 Identify and apply AI-driven business analytics technologies, their underlying concepts and business

learningObjectives.value: CLO2: Consolidate analytical and critical thinking skills to solve real-world business problems using AI-driven solutions.
learningObjectives.quote: CLO2 Consolidate analytical and critical thinking skills to solve real-world business problems using AI-driven solutions.

learningObjectives.value: CLO3: Explain the rationale behind the application of supervised and unsupervised predictive models to analyse structured and unstructured data, to solve real-world organisational problems.
learningObjectives.quote: CLO3 Explain the rationale behind the application of supervised and unsupervised predictive models to analyse structured and unstructured data, to solve real-world organisational problems.

learningObjectives.value: CLO4: Communicate effectively the business problem at hand, explain the outcomes of the predictive models generated by machine learning algorithms, and unravel actionable insights.
learningObjectives.quote: CLO4 Communicate effectively the business problem at hand, explain the outcomes of the predictive models generated by machine learning algorithms, and unravel actionable insights.

learningObjectives.value: CLO5: Discuss ethical implications aligned with SDGs (Sustainable Development Goals) principles/objectives when implementing AI-driven analytics and articulate their impacts on individuals, organisations and society at large.
learningObjectives.quote: CLO5 Discuss ethical implications aligned with SDGs (Sustainable Development Goals) principles/objectives when implementing AI-driven analytics and articulate their impacts on individuals, organisations and society at large.

learningObjectives.value: CLO6: Develop collaborative teamwork skills for solving AI-driven business problems.
